subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! O My leaf! Hearken thou unto My call from the direction of My prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی یا ورقتی اسمعی ندائی من شطر سجنی
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @service to others; to the Cause of God
